zh.Mjölby, Skenninge sogn, ÖsterGötland Leh: 瑞典額斯特格特藍德米越爾比
zh.lifeSummary: 當King Magnus Ladulås Birgersson King of Sweden於大約1240年出生時，他的父親Birger Magnusson Folkungaätten40歲，母親Ingeborg Eriksdotter30歲。他於1276年11月11日與Helvig av Holstein在瑞典烏普薩拉卡爾馬結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1290年12月18日在瑞典越可平維辛索享年51歲。

zh-hans.Mjölby, Skenninge sogn, ÖsterGötland Leh: 瑞典額斯特格特藍德米越爾比
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当King Magnus Ladulås Birgersson King of Sweden于大约1240年出生时，他的父亲Birger Magnusson Folkungaätten40岁，母亲Ingeborg Eriksdotter30岁。他于1276年11月11日与Helvig av Holstein在瑞典烏普薩拉卡爾馬结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1290年12月18日在瑞典越可平維辛索享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Magnus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Latin byname meaning ‘great’, this was first extracted from the name of Charlemagne (recorded in Latin chronicles as Carolus Magnus ‘Charles the Great’) and used as a given name by the Scandinavians. It was borne by seven medieval kings of Norway, including Magnus I ( 1024–47 ), known as Magnus the Good, and Magnus VI ( 1238–80 ), known as Magnus the Law Mender. There are several early Scandinavian saints called Magnus, including an earl of Orkney ( d. 1116 ), to whom Kirkwall cathedral is dedicated. The name was imported to Scotland and Ireland during the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.description: King Eriksson died. Valdemar crowned King. Birger Jarl declared regent until Valdemar is of age.

historicEvents.title: Earliest Mention of Stockholm
historicEvents.description: The earliest known recorded history of the city of Stockholm is in Norse sagas as Agnafit which dates to 1252. The city rose to prominence due to Baltic trade. Stockholm is now the most populous urban area in the region.

en.lifeSummary: When King Magnus Ladulås Birgersson King of Sweden was born about 1240, his father, Birger Magnusson Folkungaätten, was 40 and his mother, Ingeborg Eriksdotter, was 30. He married Helvig av Holstein on 11 November 1276, in Kalmar, Uppsala, Sweden. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 18 December 1290, in Visingsö, Jönköping, Sweden, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque King Magnus Ladulås Birgersson King of Sweden est né environ 1240, son père, Birger Magnusson Folkungaätten, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Ingeborg Eriksdotter, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Helvig av Holstein le 11 novembre 1276, à Kalmar, Uppsala, Suède. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 18 décembre 1290, à Visingsö, Jönköping, Suède, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als King Magnus Ladulås Birgersson King of Sweden um 1240 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Birger Magnusson Folkungaätten 40 und seine Mutter Ingeborg Eriksdotter 30. Er hat am 11. November 1276 in Kalmar, Uppsala, Schweden Helvig av Holstein geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 18. Dezember 1290 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Visingsö, Jönköping, Schweden.

it.lifeSummary: Quando King Magnus Ladulås Birgersson King of Sweden è nato il circa 1240, il suo padre, Birger Magnusson Folkungaätten, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Ingeborg Eriksdotter, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Helvig av Holstein il 11 novembre 1276, nel Kalmar, Uppsala, Svezia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 18 dicembre 1290, nel Visingsö, Jönköping, Svezia, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: King Magnus Ladulås Birgersson King of Swedenが約1240年に生まれた時，父Birger Magnusson Folkungaättenは40歳，母Ingeborg Eriksdotterは30歳であった。1276年11月11日にスウェーデンウップサラカルマーでHelvig av Holsteinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1290年12月18日にスウェーデンジoンクoパングヴィシングスoで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: King Magnus Ladulås Birgersson King of Sweden(이)가 대략 1240년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Birger Magnusson Folkungaätten(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Ingeborg Eriksdotter(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1276년 11월 11일 스웨덴 업프사라 캘마에서 Helvig av Holstein(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1290년 12월 18일 스웨덴 제이oko핀그 비징스o에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando King Magnus Ladulås Birgersson King of Sweden nasceu aproximadamente 1240, seu pai, Birger Magnusson Folkungaätten, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Ingeborg Eriksdotter, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Helvig av Holstein em 11 de novembro de 1276, em Kalmar, Uppsala, Suécia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de dezembro de 1290, em Visingsö, Jönköping, Suécia, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда King Magnus Ladulås Birgersson King of Sweden родился около 1240 г., его отцу по имени Birger Magnusson Folkungaätten было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Ingeborg Eriksdotter, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Helvig av Holstein 11 ноября 1276 г. в местности калмар, уппсала, Швеция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 18 декабря 1290 г. в местности висингсo, джoнкoпинг, Швеция в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando King Magnus Ladulås Birgersson King of Sweden nació aproximadamente 1240, su papá, Birger Magnusson Folkungaätten, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Ingeborg Eriksdotter, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Helvig av Holstein el 11 de noviembre de 1276, en Kalmar, Uppsala, Suecia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 18 de diciembre de 1290, en Visingsö, Jönköping, Suecia, a la edad de 51 años.
